Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories General Special Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance.

There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS BELINDA MAN AND JOSEPHINE LAM's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, General Special Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve code compliant responses to Responses to Form Interrogatories, General Special Interrogatories and Demand For Inspection within 10 days. Sanctions against plaintiff are awarded in the amount of $360.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
